name: Mexicali Franks
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded Monterey Jack cheese with jalapeno
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the frankfurters; sauté until browned. With a slotted spoon, remove from pan and place on one side of serving dish. Keep warm.
3. To the drippings in the skillet, add onion and garlic; saute 2 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and their liquid, beans and their liquid, the salsa, rice, chili powder, and 1/2 cup water. Bring to boiling; reduce heat and simmer, covered, 15 minutes, or until rice is cooked.
5. Spoon rice mixture next to frankfurters on platter. Sprinkle cheese over rice.
6. Garnish with cilantro leaves.
Makes 6 servings.
[McCALL'S; January 1990]
